characters.appearance: A stylized, bright green owl with large eyes, a small orange beak, and orange feet. It has a simple, rounded vector-art design.
A woman with dark skin and black hair styled in a high bun. She has a simple vector-art facial structure.
characters.wardrobe: A yellow headband, a yellow short-sleeved top, and blue jeans.

characters.appearance: A woman with light skin and blonde hair. She has a sturdy build and simple vector-art features.
characters.wardrobe: A red tracksuit with white stripes and a red headband.

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: क्या English की वजह से आपका dream job अटका हुआ है? [Is your dream job stuck because of English?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing a common pain point: career stagnation due to poor English.
- Sets a relatable, empathetic tone right from the start.
- Establishes the core problem the app will solve.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Dream job अटका है?
[Dream job stuck?]

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: तो try करो Supernova के daily English lessons. [Then try Supernova's daily English lessons.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the brand as the immediate solution to the hook.
- Highlights the 'daily lessons' feature, emphasizing consistency.
- Visually demonstrates the app interface to build familiarity.

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: हमारे AI tutor के साथ रोज़ practice करो और confidence बढ़ाओ। [Practice daily with our AI tutor and increase your confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the core differentiator: the AI tutor.
- Shifts the emotional beat to encouragement and confidence-building.
- Uses the visual of a high-five to reinforce a supportive, 'older sibling' brand voice.

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: Real-world situations में English बोलना सीखो, बिना किसी झिझक के। [Learn to speak English in real-world situations, without any hesitation.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Focuses on practical application (real-world situations) rather than just grammar.
- Addresses the emotional barrier of 'hesitation' (झिझक).
- Shows the speaking feature in action to prove the app's utility.

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: ताकि interview हो या office, आप हमेशा ready रहो। [So that whether it's an interview or office, you are always ready.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Connects the learning back to the original goal: career success.
- Uses the flexing visual to represent empowerment and readiness.
- Delivers the emotional payoff of feeling prepared.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: Can we practice for my job interview today? [Can we practice for my job interview today?]
Unknown speaker says: Supernova है आसान, practical, और बहुत effective. [Supernova is easy, practical, and very effective.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Replaces the competitor's 'free' claim with value-driven adjectives (easy, practical, effective).
- Shows a relevant real-world text prompt (job interview practice).
- Reinforces the app's core value proposition before the final CTA.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
It's easy
It's practical
It's effective

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: आज ही Supernova app download करो और अपनी English journey शुरू करो। [Download the Supernova app today and start your English journey.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear, direct Call to Action (CTA).
- Removes aggressive 'world's #1' hype in favor of an encouraging push to start the journey.
- Displays app store badges for immediate conversion.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
Download the app today.
Download on the App Store
GET IT ON Google Play
